title: Gradients Evolved
description: Adds new blocks that I think that should be in the game
body:
### *Your world. Your palette. Evolved.* [![License](https://img.shields.io/badge/License-AllRightsReserved-4a90d9?style=flat-square)](LICENSE) --- *Ever feel like vanilla blocks just don't have enough variety?* **Gradients Evolved** fills the gaps and bringing a rich palette of block variants built specifically for builders who want more control, more detail, and more creativity in every build just like me.
--- ## Overview **Gradients Evolved** is a builder-focused mod that expands Minecraft's block palette with beautiful new variants of existing blocks. Whether you're crafting a rustic village, a towering castle, or a modern cityscape — Gradients Evolved gives you the blocks to make it happen. Every block has been carefully designed to feel **native to Minecraft** — no jarring textures, no out-of-place designs. Just seamless extensions of the vanilla palette you already love (some may have a 16x16+ textures though but not all of them). --- ## Features ### New Block Variants Dozens of new variants for existing blocks, including: - **Mossy, cracked, and weathered** versions of stone-type blocks - **Chiseled and polished** versions for refined builds - **Aged and worn** variants for that perfect ruined aesthetic ### Built for Builders - Every variant fits naturally alongside vanilla blocks - Consistent textures that respect Minecraft's art style - No bloated item lists — only what builders actually need --- ## Support Found a bug or have a feature request? - **Bugs** → [GitHub Issues](https://github.com/KingThenuja/Gradients-Evolved/issues) Please include your **Minecraft version**, **mod loader**, and a **description of the issue** when reporting bugs. Screenshots and crash logs are always appreciated! --- ## License Gradients Evolved is licensed under the **ARR License**. You are free to use this mod in modpacks — no permission needed, just credit appreciated! ---
*If you enjoy the mod, consider leaving a heart on Modrinth — it helps more than you know!*
